name: newb-builder
description: Build and publish your own expert agent to the newb marketplace.

interface.shortDescription: Build & publish an expert agent to the newb marketplace.
interface.longDescription: Turn your domain expertise into a hosted agent that others can install. The builder interviews you, scaffolds a bundle, helps you write the agent's instructions, validates it, and publishes it live — where it runs server-side and anyone can pull it into Claude or Codex with free credits.
